{
  "title": "Oval Diamond Solitaire Engagement Ring - 18K Gold",
  "description": "Classic solitaire engagement ring featuring a 1.5 carat oval-cut diamond center stone (10mm x 7mm) set in a four-prong setting on an 18K gold band. The band features a comfort-fit interior with a width of 2.5mm tapering to 2mm at the base of the setting. The prongs are designed with claw-style tips for secure stone retention while maximizing light exposure. Total ring height from finger is approximately 8mm including the stone setting.",
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 20.0,
    "height": 8.0,
    "depth": 20.0
  },
  "features": [
    "Oval-cut diamond center stone mounting (10mm x 7mm x 4.5mm)",
    "Four-prong claw setting with 0.8mm prong thickness",
    "Tapered band design (2.5mm to 2.0mm width)",
    "Comfort-fit interior band profile",
    "Gallery underneath setting for light optimization",
    "Size 6.5 US standard (16.9mm internal diameter)",
    "Polished finish on all surfaces",
    "Reinforced prong-to-band junction"
  ],
  "material": "18K Gold (75% gold, 25% alloy)",
  "file_format": "STEP",
  "complexity": "medium"
}
